The CFP
shall be flexible to allow rapid response across various stress scenarios.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be flexible to allow rapid response across various stress scenarios

controls.control_objective: To ensure be closely integrated with bank's ongoing analysis of liquidity risk and with the results of the scenarios and assumptions used in stress tests
controls.control_description:
The
design, plans and procedures shall be closely integrated with bank's ongoing
analysis of liquidity risk and with the results of the scenarios and assumptions
used in stress tests.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be closely integrated with bank's ongoing analysis of liquidity risk and with the results of the scenarios and assumptions used in stress tests

controls.control_objective: To ensure address liquidity requirements over a range of different time horizons including intraday
controls.control_description:
The plan shall address liquidity requirements over a range
of different time horizons including intraday.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to address liquidity requirements over a range of different time horizons including intraday

controls.control_objective: To ensure set out a clear decision-making process on what actions to take at what time, who can take them, and what issues need to be escalated to top managemen
controls.control_description:
CFP shall set out a clear decision-making process on what actions to take at
what time, who can take them, and what issues need to be escalated to Top
Management of a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set out a clear decision-making process on what actions to take at what time, who can take them, and what issues need to be escalated to top managemen

controls.control_objective: To ensure be explicit procedures for effective internal coordination and communication across bank's different business lines and locations
controls.control_description:
There shall be explicit procedures for effective internal
coordination and communication across bank's different business lines and
locations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be explicit procedures for effective internal coordination and communication across bank's different business lines and locations

controls.control_objective: To ensure also address when and how to contact external parties, such as supervisors, central bank, or payments system operators
controls.control_description:
It shall also address when and how to contact external parties, such
as supervisors, central bank, or payments system operators.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also address when and how to contact external parties, such as supervisors, central bank, or payments system operators

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain clear policies and procedures that will enable a bank's management to make timely and well-informed decisions, execute contingency measures sw
controls.control_description:
CFP shall
contain clear policies and procedures that will enable a bank's management to
make timely and well-informed decisions, execute contingency measures swiftly
and proficiently, and communicate effectively to implement the plan efficiently,
including:
(1) clear specification of roles and responsibilities, including the authority to
invoke the CFP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain clear policies and procedures that will enable a bank's management to make timely and well-informed decisions, execute contingency measures sw

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed by the board at least on an annual basis
controls.control_description:
CFPs must be tested regularly to ensure their effectiveness and operational
feasibility and shall be reviewed by the Board at least on an annual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed by the board at least on an annual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out both the analyses
controls.control_description:
A bank shall carry out both the
analyses.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out both the analyses

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applied to the bank-level position of assets, liabilities, and obs items of a bank which are rate sensitive
controls.control_description:
The framework, both DGA and TGA, shall be applied to the bank-level position
of assets, liabilities, and OBS items of a bank which are rate sensitive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applied to the bank-level position of assets, liabilities, and obs items of a bank which are rate sensitive

controls.control_objective: To ensure compute its irr position in each currency applying the dga and tga to the rate sensitive assets (rsa) / rate sensitive liabilities (rsl) items
controls.control_description:
A bank
shall compute its IRR position in each currency applying the DGA and TGA to
the Rate Sensitive Assets (RSA) / Rate Sensitive Liabilities (RSL) items, where
either the assets, or liabilities in a currency constitute 5 per cent or more of bank's
assets or liabilities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compute its irr position in each currency applying the dga and tga to the rate sensitive assets (rsa) / rate sensitive liabilities (rsl) items

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed separately on an aggregate basis
controls.control_description:
The IRR position in all other residual currencies shall be
computed separately on an aggregate basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed separately on an aggregate basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure serve as a benchmark
controls.control_description: The methodologies specified in these Directions shall serve as a benchmark.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to serve as a benchmark

controls.control_objective: To ensure also adopt the dga and tga as supervisory reporting / disclosure frameworks
controls.control_description:
A
bank which has more sophisticated systems may continue its existing systems
but shall also adopt the DGA and TGA as supervisory reporting / disclosure
frameworks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also adopt the dga and tga as supervisory reporting / disclosure frameworks

controls.control_objective: To ensure be generated by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets and obs positions into time buckets according to residual maturity or next repricing perio
controls.control_description:
The Gap Report shall be generated by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets
and OBS positions into time buckets according to residual maturity or next
repricing period, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be generated by grouping rate sensitive liabilities, assets and obs positions into time buckets according to residual maturity or next repricing perio

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the traditional gap analysis to measure the level of a bank's exposure to irr in terms of sensitivity of its nii to interest rate movements over t
controls.control_description:
A bank shall use the traditional Gap analysis to measure the level of a bank's
exposure to IRR in terms of sensitivity of its NII to interest rate movements over
the horizon of analysis, which is usually one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the traditional gap analysis to measure the level of a bank's exposure to irr in terms of sensitivity of its nii to interest rate movements over t

controls.control_objective: To ensure bucket all rsa, rsl, and obs items as per residual maturity / re-pricing date in various time buckets as per guidance provided in annex vi and report
controls.control_description:
A bank shall bucket all RSA,
RSL, and OBS items as per residual maturity / re-pricing date in various time
buckets as per guidance provided in Annex VI and report as per the reporting
format of Interest Rate Sensitivity (IRS) statement provided in Annex-III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to bucket all rsa, rsl, and obs items as per residual maturity / re-pricing date in various time buckets as per guidance provided in annex vi and report

controls.control_objective: To ensure compute earnings at risk (ear) representing the loss of income under different interest rate scenarios over a time horizon of one year
controls.control_description:
A bank
shall compute Earnings at Risk (EaR) representing the loss of income under
different interest rate scenarios over a time horizon of one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compute earnings at risk (ear) representing the loss of income under different interest rate scenarios over a time horizon of one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used
controls.control_description:
For calculation of changes in MVE due to changes in the interest rates, market
values of RSA and RSL shall be used.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used as an approximation
controls.control_description:
However, for simplicity, the book values
of the RSA and RSL (both inclusive of notional value of rate sensitive OBS items)
may be used as an approximation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used as an approximation

controls.control_objective: To ensure bucket all rsa, rsl, and obs position as per residual maturity / re-pricing dates in various time buckets as per the guidance provided in annex vi, an
controls.control_description:
A bank shall bucket all RSA, RSL, and OBS position as per residual maturity /
re-pricing dates in various time buckets as per the guidance provided in Annex
VI, and compute the Modified Duration Gap (MDG).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bucket all rsa, rsl, and obs position as per residual maturity / re-pricing dates in various time buckets as per the guidance provided in annex vi, an

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used to evaluate the impact on the mve of the bank under different interest rate scenarios
controls.control_description:
The MDG shall be used to
evaluate the impact on the MVE of the bank under different interest rate
scenarios.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used to evaluate the impact on the mve of the bank under different interest rate scenarios

controls.control_description:
Under MDG framework a bank shall compute Modified Duration of RSA (MDA)
and Modified Duration of RSL (MDL).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compute modified duration of rsa (mda) and modified duration of rsl (mdl)

The estimated drop in MVE resulting from the prescribed interest rate shock shall
indicate the economic impact on a bank's equity, assuming the shock scenario
materialises.

controls.control_description:
This decline shall not be construed as an accounting loss as
banking book is not marked to market.

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so
controls.control_description:
However, a bank that
has the capability to use market value of assets and liabilities of banking book
shall do so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined by discounted cash flow method
controls.control_description:
The market values of assets and liabilities shall be determined by
discounted cash flow method.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined by discounted cash flow method

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included as rsa if positive and as rsl if negative
controls.control_description:
The
absolute notional amount of rate sensitive off-balance sheet items in each
time bucket shall be included as RSA if positive and as RSL if negative.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included as rsa if positive and as rsl if negative

controls.control_description:
(3) The mid-point of each time bucket shall be taken as a proxy for the maturity
of assets and liabilities in that time bucket, except for those for which the
bank is able to compute modified duration on individual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken as a proxy for the maturity of assets and liabilities in that time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable across the bank's entire balance sheet, i
controls.control_description:
The requirement to determine the impact of IRR on the Market Value Equity
(MVE) shall be applicable across the bank's entire balance sheet, i.e., both the
banking and trading books.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable across the bank's entire balance sheet, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the irs statement, under tga and dga, as per reporting format provided in annex-iii, bucketing all rsa and rsl in following time buckets as pe
controls.control_description:
A bank shall prepare the IRS statement, under TGA and DGA, as per reporting
format provided in Annex-III, bucketing all RSA and RSL in following time buckets
as per table below:
Sr.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified in the relevant time buckets based on residual maturity / re-pricing dates
controls.control_description:
The RSA and RSL with fixed maturities shall be classified in the relevant time
buckets based on residual maturity / re-pricing dates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified in the relevant time buckets based on residual maturity / re-pricing dates

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake behavioural studies to assess the interest rate sensitivity realistically
controls.control_description:
For RSA and RSL items without fixed maturity or with embedded optionality (i.e.,
savings bank deposits, current account deposits, and mortgage loans), a bank
shall undertake behavioural studies to assess the interest rate sensitivity
realistically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake behavioural studies to assess the interest rate sensitivity realistically

controls.control_objective: To ensure have an appropriate process and a detailed framework for conducting such studies and review their output at least annually
controls.control_description:
The bank shall have an appropriate process and a detailed
framework for conducting such studies and review their output at least annually.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have an appropriate process and a detailed framework for conducting such studies and review their output at least annually

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply the results of the behavioural studies on a consistent basis and the results shall be reviewed / revised once a year in the first quarter of the financial year
controls.control_description:
A bank shall apply the results of the behavioural studies on a consistent basis
and the results shall be reviewed / revised once a year in the first quarter of the
financial year, if necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply the results of the behavioural studies on a consistent basis and the results shall be reviewed / revised once a year in the first quarter of the financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on at least three years data
controls.control_description:
The behavioural studies shall be based on at least
three years data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on at least three years data

controls.control_objective: To ensure evolve a suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets and liabilities and ob
controls.control_description:
The bank shall evolve a suitable mechanism, supported by
empirical studies and behavioural analysis to estimate the future behaviour of
assets and liabilities and OBS items with respect to changes in market variables.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to evolve a suitable mechanism, supported by empirical studies and behavioural analysis to estimate the future behaviour of assets and liabilities and ob

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so to improve the accuracy of measurement of irr
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, a bank having the capability to
compute the MD of each item of RSA and RSL shall do so to improve the
accuracy of measurement of IRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so to improve the accuracy of measurement of irr

controls.control_objective: To ensure : (1) group rsa and rsl under the broad categories indicated in annex vi under various time buckets
controls.control_description:
However, a bank which is not equipped to compute the MD of each individual
rate sensitive asset, liability and OBS position shall:
(1) group RSA and RSL under the broad categories indicated in Annex VI under
various time buckets;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to : (1) group rsa and rsl under the broad categories indicated in annex vi under various time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be simpler, providing a cost effective alternative despite approximations in the calculation of md
controls.control_description:
MDG computed from this approach shall be simpler, providing a cost effective
alternative despite approximations in the calculation of MD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be simpler, providing a cost effective alternative despite approximations in the calculation of md

controls.control_objective: To ensure compile the alm statements and compute the mdg for the entire balance sheet, encompassing both the banking and trading books
controls.control_description:
A bank shall compile the ALM statements and compute the MDG for the entire
balance sheet, encompassing both the banking and trading books.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compile the alm statements and compute the mdg for the entire balance sheet, encompassing both the banking and trading books

controls.control_objective: To ensure convert the foreign currencies into ₹ using the relevant spot closing rates as published by fedai
controls.control_description:
While reporting the currency-wise IRR position, as advised in paragraph 70
above, in IRS statement provided in Annex-III, a bank shall convert the foreign
currencies into ₹ using the relevant spot closing rates as published by FEDAI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convert the foreign currencies into ₹ using the relevant spot closing rates as published by fedai

controls.control_objective: To ensure compute the md of each item or group of items of rate sensitive assets, liabilities and obs items using the appropriate coupon and relevant foreign cu
controls.control_description:
A
bank shall compute the MD of each item or group of items of rate sensitive
assets, liabilities and OBS items using the appropriate coupon and relevant
foreign currency yield curve.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compute the md of each item or group of items of rate sensitive assets, liabilities and obs items using the appropriate coupon and relevant foreign cu

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the appropriate coupon and yield curve of the largest among the residual currencies
controls.control_description:
For residual currencies, a bank may use the
appropriate coupon and yield curve of the largest among the residual currencies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the appropriate coupon and yield curve of the largest among the residual currencies

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the principles outlined in annex vi
controls.control_description:
In deciding the appropriate coupon and yield curves, a bank shall follow the
principles outlined in Annex VI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the principles outlined in annex vi

controls.control_description:
A bank shall, with the approval of its Board / RMC, set appropriate internal limits
on Earnings at Risk (EaR) and volatility in the MVE, based on its risk bearing and
risk management capacity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , with the approval of its board / rmc, set appropriate internal limits on earnings at risk (ear) and volatility in the mve, based on its risk bearing

controls.control_objective: To ensure be linked to mve for dga and the nii for tga
controls.control_description:
These limits shall be linked to MVE for DGA and the
NII for TGA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be linked to mve for dga and the nii for tga

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically review the above limits after assessing various scenarios of interest rates and the resultant volatility of earnings in terms of nii and
controls.control_description:
The Board / ALCO shall periodically review the above limits after
assessing various scenarios of interest rates and the resultant volatility of
earnings in terms of NII and volatility in Net Worth.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically review the above limits after assessing various scenarios of interest rates and the resultant volatility of earnings in terms of nii and

controls.control_description:
ALCO prior approval shall be obtained for deciding upon yields, assumptions
used / proposed to be used, bucketing, behavioural studies, etc., for DGA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained for deciding upon yields, assumptions used / proposed to be used, bucketing, behavioural studies, etc

controls.control_description:
A bank
shall ensure that such decisions are compliant with extant regulatory guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that such decisions are compliant with extant regulatory guidelines

controls.control_description:
A bank shall update material assumptions on a regular basis to reflect the current
market and operating environment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to update material assumptions on a regular basis to reflect the current market and operating environment

controls.control_objective: To ensure be formalized and reviewed at least annually
controls.control_description:
The process for developing such material
assumptions shall be formalized and reviewed at least annually.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be formalized and reviewed at least annually

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the practice of periodic model validation
controls.control_description: A bank shall adopt the practice of periodic model validation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the practice of periodic model validation

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure the integrity and validation of data / assumptions being used to generate the results, validation and functioning of the entire system of irr m
controls.control_description:
In cases where
internal models / software packages are used, the bank shall ensure the integrity
and validation of data / assumptions being used to generate the results,
validation and functioning of the entire system of IRR management by an
independent audit either by an experienced internal auditor or external auditor
who is conversant with risk management processes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure the integrity and validation of data / assumptions being used to generate the results, validation and functioning of the entire system of irr m

controls.control_description:
The Audit Committee of the
Board (ACB) shall ensure the suitability of auditors through a due diligence
process.

validation process.

controls.control_description:
All material assumptions, regardless of the source, shall be

A bank shall prepare the IRS Statement, under TGA and DGA, as per reporting

controls.control_description:
A bank shall submit IRS Statement under TGA and DGA approaches on a

controls.control_description:
Further, bank shall refer Reserve Bank of India (Filing of

controls.control_objective: To ensure compute the average coupon for the advances portfolio by comparing the interest income during the relevant accounting period from 'standard' advances
controls.control_description: Banks may compute the average coupon for the advances portfolio by comparing the interest income during the relevant accounting period from 'standard' advances to the monthly average outstanding 'standard' advances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to compute the average coupon for the advances portfolio by comparing the interest income during the relevant accounting period from 'standard' advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure be estimated by each bank to arrive at the applicable yield

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as follows : multiply the outstanding advances in each bucket with the internal rating scores to arrive at the weighted average rating of the advan
controls.control_description:
One of the methods for estimating the average rating may be as follows :
Multiply the outstanding advances in each bucket with the internal rating scores to arrive at the weighted average rating of the advances in that bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as follows : multiply the outstanding advances in each bucket with the internal rating scores to arrive at the weighted average rating of the advan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mapped to an external rating

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the rating scores of large advances / rated advances in each bucket (mapped with the rating of external agency) for arriving at weighted average r
controls.control_description: In case a major portion of the bank's advances in a particular time bucket happens to be unrated, the bank may use the rating scores of large advances / rated advances in each bucket (mapped with the rating of external agency) for arriving at weighted average rating for the bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the rating scores of large advances / rated advances in each bucket (mapped with the rating of external agency) for arriving at weighted average r
